emails.subject: ACT NOW!!! Your EXCLUSIVE 100% FREE bonus is waiting $$$
emails.body:
CONGRATULATIONS!!! You have been selected as a WINNER!

This once in a lifetime, limited time offer is 100% free and completely risk-free. Act now to claim your free cash bonus, double your discount, and make money fast from home.

No cost, no fees, satisfaction guaranteed. Why pay more? Buy now and earn money today. This is not spam.

Click here to claim: https://deals.example/claim
